title: GOOD: Thread join with timeout + abort fallback in lichen_lora_l2_stop
description: lora_l2.c lines 299-307: stop() tries graceful join with timeout, then aborts if the RX thread is stuck in lora_recv(). Abort + k_thread_join(K_FOREVER) guarantees thread struct is safe to reuse on next start(). This handles the real-world case where radio drivers can hang, without leaking thread resources.
